blocks.text: filed it. The listing detail. He didn't know yet what it meant.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: As people. Normal people who go to bonfires and talk about nothing.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You can talk in ways that sound like nothing but are actually everything.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: It is not the same thing.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He said Nadia mentioned the area.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I work with you. Things leak.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Then stop saying it like it's something.

options.label: Yes. People suggest places to friends all the time.
Not sure yet. But probably not.
